prose: Furan frontier-orbital analysis via DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier standard) in gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, using PySCF. Geometry: single-point on input coordinates from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz` (9 atoms). SCF converged in 9 cycles. HOMO = −6.360 eV, LUMO = −0.102 eV. **HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.257 eV** (Koopmans orbital energy gap, not an excitation energy). Frontier orbital sample: HOMO−2 (−10.332 eV), HOMO−1 (−7.871 eV), LUMO+1 (+1.448 eV), LUMO+2 (+1.702 eV). Vertical ionization potential (IP) = 6.360 eV; vertical electron affinity (EA) = 0.102 eV; electronegativity (Koopmans) = 3.231 eV; chemical hardness = 3.129 eV; electrophilicity index = 1.668 eV. Total electronic energy (B3LYP/def2-TZVP zero) = −230.114 Hartree. No experimental comparison offered. Integrity status: OK, trustworthy. Command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz`.
